parameters.content:
## Setup (see repo README)
1. Replace YOUR_SPREADSHEET_ID in every Google Sheets node.
2. Attach credentials: Google Sheets, Gmail, Slack, and an HTTP Header Auth credential for Gemini (header `X-goog-api-key`).
3. Point the Slack nodes at your review channel.
4. Trigger: POST the production webhook URL (wire it to a Slack slash command) or press Execute.

If Gemini free tier is rate-limited, disable the Gemini node and enable the Groq node (header `Authorization: Bearer <key>`) - the Parse Drafts node understands both response shapes, and anyone still missing a draft gets the built-in plain template.
